ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the survey started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the survey ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "survey_version" INTEGER /* Version of the survey */,
  "survey_status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "question_order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the survey */,
  "question_options" TEXT /* Options for multiple-choice questions */,
  "question_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the question is mandatory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response is for */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent who provided the response */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was recorded */,
  "response_score" INTEGER /* Score assigned to the response */,
  "response_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the respondent */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the respondent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the respondent */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the respondent */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the respondent */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the respondent */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the respondent */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the respondent */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the respondent */,
  "religious_belief" TEXT /* Religious belief of the respondent */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the respondent */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the respondent */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Number of people in the respondent's household */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the respondent has children */,
  "political_affiliation" TEXT /* Political affiliation of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_income_bracket FOREIGN KEY ("income_bracket") REFERENCES income_brackets ("income_bracket"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_religious_belief FOREIGN KEY ("religious_belief") REFERENCES religious_beliefs ("religious_belief"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_education_level FOREIGN KEY ("education_level") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., Northeast, Midwest) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the state */,
  "education_level_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of education levels in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_states" (
  "survey_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey-state combination */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of respondents in the state */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate in the state */,
  "demographic_summary" TEXT /* Summary of demographic data for the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_states_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_states_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses_by_state" (
  "response_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response-state combination */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "response_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of respondents in the state who provided this response */,
  "response_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of responses across different demographic groups */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_by_state_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES survey_responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_by_state_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "education_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_brackets" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income bracket */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Name of the income bracket */,
  "income_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the income bracket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "religious_beliefs" (
  "belief_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each religious belief */,
  "religious_belief" TEXT /* Name of the religious belief */,
  "belief_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the religious belief */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("belief_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions_by_topic" (
  "question_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question-topic combination */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "topic_weight" REAL /* Importance of the topic in the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_by_topic_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_by_topic_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "topic_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses_by_education" (
  "response_education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response-education combination */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education level */,
  "response_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of respondents in the education level who provided this response */,
  "education_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of responses across different education levels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_by_education_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_by_education_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES survey_responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses_by_income" (
  "response_income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response-income combination */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income bracket */,
  "response_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of respondents in the income bracket who provided this response */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of responses across different income brackets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_by_income_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES income_brackets ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_by_income_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES survey_responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses_by_religion" (
  "response_religion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response-religion combination */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response */,
  "belief_id" INTEGER /* ID of the religious belief */,
  "response_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of respondents in the religious belief who provided this response */,
  "belief_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of responses across different religious beliefs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_religion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_by_religion_belief_id FOREIGN KEY ("belief_id") REFERENCES religious_beliefs ("belief_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_by_religion_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES survey_responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)
